evals.expected_output: New MCP server plan: research FastMCP v3, design tools from GitHub API, scaffold under mcp/github/.
assertions: Agent dispatches to New server mode for service name.
Loads references/tool-design.md and server-composition before coding.
Uses live docs fetch (Context7 or gofastmcp) first; bundled refs as fallback.
Follows repo convention: mcp/<kebab>/ , fastmcp.json, uv workspace.

evals.prompt: Extend the existing stripe integration in mcp/stripe/ to add new customer tools
evals.expected_output: Auto-detects Extend mode from path to first-party server; audits then plans additions.
assertions: Agent detects path to existing mcp/ server as Develop/Extend.
Audits current components before proposing.
Does not confuse with new-server create.
Respects phase boundaries: research before scaffold.

evals.expected_output: Convert OpenAPI path: scaffolds then uses server-composition OpenAPIProvider.
assertions: Detects OpenAPI spec input.
Starts Phase 2 scaffold then loads composition reference.
Uses OpenAPIProvider pattern, not manual tool impl for all.

evals.prompt: Create a FastAPI endpoint for user auth
evals.expected_output: Refusal or redirect: NOT for REST/CLI; this is MCP server creation skill.
assertions: Agent states scope is MCP servers only.
Suggests other skills for REST APIs or CLI.
Does not start MCP scaffolding for non-MCP request.

evals.prompt: /mcp-creator Stripe and implement the server now
evals.expected_output: Presents full plan/audit first; waits for approval before writing files or code.
assertions: Agent produces research + component inventory + plan with approval gate.
Does not create mcp/ dir or server.py until explicit approval.
Separates planning from implementation phases.

evals.prompt: /mcp-creator create an MCP that takes api_key as a tool param for the payment service
evals.expected_output: Refuses secret as tool param; requires env var only + auth patterns from references.
assertions: Agent enforces: Secrets in env vars only. Never accept tokens as tool parameters.
Routes auth design to references/auth-and-security.md .
Requires annotations including destructiveHint etc.
Insists on ToolError for failures, no stdout.

evals.prompt: /mcp-creator debug why my server prints during tool calls
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis: print() is invalid because stdout is the transport; use ctx.info and ToolError.
assertions: Agent identifies stdout misuse as critical violation.
Cites the 10 critical rules verbatim for no stdout, ToolError, annotations.
Does not suggest fixes that would still print.

evals.expected_output: Gallery/help that lists modes (New, Extend, Convert OpenAPI/FastAPI, Debug, Learn) with examples.
assertions: Agent shows dispatch table for empty args.
Mentions live docs priority.
Does not start any implementation without arguments.
